component.name: JuhRadial MX
component.summary: Beautiful radial menu for Logitech MX Master mice on Linux

description.p: JuhRadial MX brings a Logi Options+ inspired radial menu experience to Linux. Hold the gesture button on your MX Master mouse to open a beautiful glassmorphic radial menu overlay, then move to select actions.

ul.li: Glassmorphic radial menu with smooth animations
Per-application profiles for context-aware actions
Real-time battery status monitoring via HID++ protocol
Visual DPI control with presets (400-8000 DPI)
SmartShift scroll wheel configuration
Haptic feedback for menu selections
Beautiful Catppuccin Mocha dark theme
Native KDE Plasma and Wayland integration

description.p: JuhRadial MX never modifies your mouse's onboard memory, ensuring 100% compatibility with Logi Options+ on Windows and macOS.

screenshot.caption: Radial menu overlay with JuhRadial MX theme

description.p: Cursor placement on GNOME Wayland, menu dismissal, and action fixes

ul.li: Radial menu opens at the cursor on GNOME Wayland, including scaled displays
A second tap closes the menu again instead of reopening it
Only one overlay instance runs at a time, so the gesture button stays responsive
Thumb-wheel assignments made in the Buttons tab now take effect
Screenshot action picks a capture tool that works on the running desktop
GNOME cursor helper extension supports GNOME Shell 50

description.p: Thumb-wheel actions, per-application profiles, and portable system actions

ul.li: Bind the thumb-wheel to volume, zoom, or horizontal scroll
DPI, button, and scroll settings switch automatically per application
Portable system actions use the native mechanism for each desktop
Live battery, DPI, ratchet, and Easy-Switch state on the Devices page
Correct menu position under fractional scaling, and niri support

description.p: Automatic logid restart on Easy-Switch device reconnect

ul.li: Added udev rule and systemd service to auto-restart logid when a Logitech mouse reconnects after Easy-Switch
Fixes radial menu not appearing after switching mouse between computers

description.p: Radial wheel polish, translations, and performance improvements

ul.li: New 3D radial wheel art with per-theme etching and consistent slice geometry
Expanded translations for settings navigation and radial menu actions
Center label auto-fit prevents long translations from clipping
Optimized settings/overlay code paths to reduce UI lag and CPU usage

description.p: Fixed high CPU usage and zombie process when settings window is shown

ul.li: Fixed Zeroconf (mDNS) resource leak causing high CPU after network discovery
Fixed settings process not exiting after window close
FlowPage now lazy-loaded to avoid unnecessary network discovery at startup
Added Input Leap (open-source KVM) detection in Flow network scan

description.p: Critical fix for gesture button detection

ul.li: Fixed logid button CID and divert flag for all MX Master mice
Fixed systemd service path to match install location

description.p: Bug fix release for Fedora 43 and Arch Linux installation

ul.li: Fixed install script package names for PyQt6 SVG support
Fixed command injection vulnerability in radial menu
Fixed insecure pairing code generation
Fixed overly permissive udev rules
Easy-Switch now works in radial menu
Instant cursor detection on Hyprland (1000x faster)
Scroll speed control for Hyprland, KDE, Sway, and X11
Fixed SmartShift ratchet/freespin toggle
HiResScroll HID++ support
Improved radial menu configuration
Glassmorphic radial menu overlay
Battery status monitoring
Settings dashboard with mouse visualization
DPI and scroll wheel configuration
KDE Plasma 6 and Hyprland integration
